untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom decile-based portfolio sorting by 3-year historical volatility (63 weeks of weekly return data), which is not expressible using point-in-time indicator comparisons. The strategy requires: (1) calculation of 3-year rolling volatility across a universe, (2) ranking/sorting into deciles, (3) portfolio-level construction (long decile 1, short decile 10). This is a cross-sectional ranking strategy that requires universe aggregation and relative positioning, not single-stock technical conditions. Available hvol_20 indicator only provides 20-period volatility, not 3-year lookback.
translation_notes: This signal describes a cross-sectional volatility factor strategy requiring decile-based portfolio construction across a stock universe. Standard backtest engines with point-in-time technical indicators cannot natively express this logic. Implementation requires: (1) custom volatility calculation module for 63-week windows using weekly returns, (2) universe ranking/sorting mechanism, (3) portfolio-level long/short construction. The alpha spreads by region (US: 4%, Europe: 7.1%, Japan: 10.5%) should be tracked separately by market. Rebalancing frequency is unspecified and should be defined separately.
